# StepsWidget { #steps_widget.widget.StepsWidget }

```python
steps_widget.widget.StepsWidget(code, namespace=None)
```

Displays the substitution/reduction trace of `# PRINT STEPS`-tagged
statements in `code`, one panel per tagged line.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**code**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Source to trace. Statements followed by a `# PRINT STEPS`-style comment (see `steps_widget.print_steps`) are evaluated step by step; everything else runs normally.

<code>[**namespace**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Namespace to execute `code` in. Defaults to the live notebook's namespace when called from a running kernel, or a fresh dict otherwise (e.g. for headless use in tests).
